texto: Have you ever thought that if one thing hadn't happened, a whole set of things never would have either? Like dominoes in time, a single event kicked off an unstoppable series of changes that gained momentum and spun out of control, and nothing was ever the same again. Don't ever doubt that a mere second can change your life forever.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kimberly K. Jones: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Have you ever thought that if one thing hadn't happened, a whole set of things never would have e…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, chain-reaction, change pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e change.
